name: A Force to Be Reckoned With

system.description:
Any intelligent creature who looks you in the eye or hears the steel in your voice instinctively knows that you are a force to be reckoned with, and treats you appropriately.

When you Defy Danger against something trying to harm or constrain you, on a 12+ you turn the tables on them (the GM will say how, or ask you to). (Replaces Underestimated. First use crosses off "Would-be" on the front page.)
